seo.title: AI Lyric Video Generator — Turn Songs Into Lyric Videos Online
seo.description: Upload your song and AI transcribes the lyrics, syncs every line to the beat, and generates mood-driven visuals. Preview and export for YouTube, TikTok, and Reels — free, no subscription.

hero.badge: AI-powered lyric videos from your song
hero.subhead: Upload your song or paste a link. AI auto-transcribes the lyrics, syncs every line to the beat, and generates visuals driven by the song's mood. Preview the full video, then export — free, no subscription needed.

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file — or paste a link. No account needed to start, and no manual lyric typing required. The AI lyric video generator works directly from your audio.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs
steps.description: Lyrics are transcribed automatically from the audio and synced to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. AI reads the song's mood and generates matching visuals so the video feels like it belongs to the track.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Watch the full draft before you publish. Confirm every lyric lands on time, then export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts. Free to export, no subscription required.

whyChoose.title: Why Make AI Lyric Videos on LyricsVideo.ai
whyChoose.description: Most AI video tools make you type a text prompt and hope for the best. LyricsVideo.ai starts from your actual song — the AI handles lyrics, timing, and visuals so you skip the manual work entirely.

highlight.title: From audio to finished video, AI handles the hard parts
highlight.description: Transcription, beat sync, and visual generation happen automatically. You review and adjust — you don't build from scratch.

cards.title: AI does the lyric work
cards.description: No typing, no pasting, no dragging on a timeline. Upload audio and get synced lyrics. The hardest part of making a lyric video is already done before you touch anything.

cards.title: Every format from one upload
cards.description: Export in 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1 from the same project. One song, one upload, every platform covered.

cards.title: Preview before you commit
cards.description: Watch the complete lyric video before exporting. Edit any line, adjust timing, and confirm the result looks right — then export when you are ready.

toolkit.title: AI Lyric Video Generator Use Cases
toolkit.description: One song becomes multiple lyric video assets — from full YouTube releases to short-form clips for every platform.

useCases.title: YouTube full-length lyric video
useCases.description: Export the entire track as a 16:9 lyric video ready for your channel.

useCases.title: TikTok and Reels clips
useCases.description: Cut the hook or chorus into a 9:16 vertical lyric video that stops the scroll.

useCases.title: Release week content
useCases.description: Generate multiple lyric clips from one single so you post fresh content every day of release week.

useCases.title: Demo and preview visuals
useCases.description: Turn an unreleased demo into a lyric video preview to share with collaborators or tease on socials.

items.question: Is this AI lyric video generator free?
items.answer: Yes. Sign up, get free credits, and export your lyric video — no subscription required, no credit card needed.

items.question: Do I need to type the lyrics myself?
items.answer: No. Upload your audio and the AI transcribes every lyric line automatically, in 50+ languages. You can click any line to edit if needed.

items.question: What audio formats are supported?
items.answer: MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, and OGG. You can also paste a link instead of uploading a file.

items.question: Can I export for TikTok and YouTube from the same project?
items.answer: Yes. Export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts — all from one upload.

items.question: Can I use exported lyric videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes — your exports are yours, including for monetized channels and paid releases. Make sure you have rights to the music you upload.

items.question: How does the AI generate visuals?
items.answer: The AI reads the mood, energy, and themes of your song and generates matching visual scenes. Every video feels like it belongs to the track, not a generic template.

bottomCta.title: Your song already has everything it needs.
bottomCta.description: Upload your track, let AI handle the lyrics and visuals, and export a finished lyric video — free.
